records.summary: The Sha-La Academy in Berlin offers a wide range of yoga teacher trainings and continuing education programmes, from a 200h multi-style YTT to short intensives in Yin, Kundalini, Katonah, and more, led by in-house and guest faculty.
records.style: Multi-style: Vinyasa, Yin, Kundalini, Katonah, Inversions, Hypnosis/Sound
records.notes: Dates and prices are clearly listed per programme which aids conversion, but this is a hub page with many mixed offerings and no curriculum detail, teacher bios, or reviews visible, and SEO is weak with no structured schema, thin H1, and no city/hours in the title.

records.summary: This URL returns a 404 error; the apprenticeship programme page has been moved or deleted.
records.notes: Page does not exist; any visitor or search engine landing here will see only a 404, losing both conversion and SEO value entirely.
